query:
SELECT 'properties.listName LIKE Robert' as ref, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM properties WHERE listName LIKE '%Robert%' OR listName LIKE '%robert%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'properties.listName LIKE Jack/Zack', COUNT(*) FROM properties WHERE listName LIKE '%Jack%' OR listName LIKE '%Zack%' OR listName LIKE '%103%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'properties.deskName LIKE Robert', COUNT(*) FROM properties WHERE deskName LIKE '%Robert%' OR deskName LIKE '%robert%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'properties.deskName LIKE Jack/Zack', COUNT(*) FROM properties WHERE deskName LIKE '%Jack%' OR deskName LIKE '%Zack%' OR deskName LIKE '%103%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'photos.userId=12030020', COUNT(*) FROM photos WHERE userId = 12030020
UNION ALL
SELECT 'photos.userId=12030025', COUNT(*) FROM photos WHERE userId = 12030025
UNION ALL

UNION ALL
SELECT 'leadTransfers.fromAgentId=12030020', COUNT(*) FROM leadTransfers WHERE fromAgentId = 12030020 OR toAgentId = 12030020
UNION ALL
SELECT 'leadTransfers.fromAgentId=12030025', COUNT(*) FROM leadTransfers WHERE fromAgentId = 12030025 OR toAgentId = 12030025;
